creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #4)
While dogfooding libglvnd in poudriere I've fixed the few ports on-the-go. Finding and fixing the rest (mainly leaf ports) requires exp-run which got delayed.

https://freshbsd.org/search?committer=jbeich&q=libglvnd

For example, games/widelands and www/iridium were found while I was testing devel/icu consumers for review D27001.
